title: Student logs in and lands on student dashboard
description: Verifies a student can sign in using the Student role and is routed to the student dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the registration number or university email field
Verify the user lands on the student dashboard

title: Staff/Admin user logs in and lands on the correct dashboard
description: Verifies a staff/admin user can sign in using the Staff/Admin role and is routed to the correct dashboard for their role.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the staff email field
Verify the user lands on an admin dashboard or a department staff dashboard

title: Student submits a new clearance request with required documents
description: Verifies a student can create and submit a new clearance request with required details/documents and sees a submission confirmation with updated status/progress.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the registration number or university email field
Start a new clearance request from the dashboard
Fill in valid request details in the request form
Attach the required documents using the attachment controls
Verify a submission confirmation is displayed
Verify the dashboard shows the newly submitted request status/progress updated

title: Student views clearance progress summary and per-department statuses
description: Verifies the student dashboard displays overall clearance progress and a list of departments with individual status indicators.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the registration number or university email field
Verify an overall clearance progress percentage is displayed
Verify a list of departments with per-department status indicators is displayed

title: Admin searches users and updates a user's role/department assignment
description: Verifies an admin can find a user via search/filter, edit role and/or department assignment, save, and see the updated user record reflected in the list.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the staff email field
Open user management from the admin dashboard
Search for a user using a valid query
Open the user record from the results
Select a different role for the user
Select a department assignment for the user
Verify the user list reflects the updated role and/or department assignment

title: Admin creates a new department and sees it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a department by providing name, code, type, and clearance configuration and then see it appear in the department list.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the staff email field
Open department management from the admin dashboard
Fill Dept Automation Test into the department name field
Fill AUTO-DEP-01 into the department code field
Verify the new department appears in the department list

title: Admin sees system metrics and recent activity on dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can access the admin dashboard and view system metrics and recent clearance activity.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the staff email field
Verify system metrics and key performance indicators are displayed
Verify a recent clearance activity feed or list is displayed

title: Student updates profile information and sees changes persist in the dashboard
description: Verifies a student can update profile contact/personal information, save successfully, and see the updated details reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the registration number or university email field
Open profile settings from the dashboard
Fill Updated Test Contact into a contact information field
Verify a save confirmation is displayed
Verify the updated profile details are displayed in profile settings or the dashboard

title: Student cannot submit clearance request with missing required information
description: Verifies the student is prevented from submitting a clearance request when a required field or document is missing and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the registration number or university email field
Start a new clearance request from the dashboard
Fill in only some request details while leaving at least one required field or document missing
Attempt to submit the clearance request
Verify a required-field or required-document validation error is displayed

title: Admin cannot create a department with a duplicate code
description: Verifies the department code must be unique by creating a department and then attempting to create another with the same code, resulting in a validation error and no duplicate created.

steps.description: Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the staff email field
Open department management from the admin dashboard
Fill Dept Duplicate Code Seed into the department name field
Fill AUTO-DUP-01 into the department code field
Fill Dept Duplicate Code Attempt into the department name field
Fill AUTO-DUP-01 into the department code field
Attempt to save the new department
Verify a duplicate-code validation error is displayed

title: Invalid password shows login validation error
description: Verifies submitting valid-looking credentials with an incorrect password shows an invalid-credentials error and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Fill student@example.edu into the registration number or university email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials validation error is displayed
